import asyncio
import pytest
from source import run_race


def test_concurrent_increments_final_count_equals_task_count():
    result = asyncio.run(run_race())
    assert result == 50, (
        f"Expected counter to be 50 after 50 concurrent increments, got {result}. "
        "Race condition: concurrent tasks read the same value before any write completes."
    )
